summary: Iteration 37 - RDV chez Titelli & Demandes Spécialistes Testing Complete. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: RDV page with social booking features, Specialists page with AI search and Lifestyle Passes.
critical_code_review_comments: RDV categories endpoint returns 8 categories (restaurant, sport, wellness, culture, nature, party, creative, other)
Lifestyle passes correctly priced: Healthy 99 CHF, Better You 149 CHF, MVP 299 CHF
Romantic subscription correctly priced at 200 CHF/month
Invitation acceptance fee is 2 CHF (Stripe checkout)
All protected endpoints correctly require authentication (401/403)
Friendly offers can be created without subscription
Romantic offers require active subscription (402 if not subscribed)
Stripe checkout URLs are correctly generated for payments
seed_data_creation: Created test offers and specialist requests during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RDV chez Titelli and Demandes Spécialistes features fully implemented and working. All APIs return correct data. Stripe integration for payments (romantic subscription, invitation acceptance, lifestyle passes) generates valid checkout URLs. WebSocket chat functionality exists but not tested (requires 2 users).

rdv_categories.returns: 8 categories with id, name, icon, description

rdv_offers_crud.notes: Friendly offers free, romantic requires subscription

rdv_invitations.accept: Redirects to Stripe checkout (2 CHF fee)

elements_verified: Stats cards (Offres créées, Rendez-vous, Invitations reçues, Abo Romantique)
Create offer modal with all form fields
AI search input with 'Recherche IA' button
Specialist request cards with urgency badges
Lifestyle Pass cards with prices and features

stripe_integration.note: Stripe checkout sessions are created correctly. Actual payment processing not tested (would require real card). Checkout URLs redirect to stripe.com

notes: All new RDV chez Titelli and Demandes Spécialistes features are fully functional. The social booking system allows users to create friendly offers for free and romantic offers with subscription. Lifestyle passes provide tiered access to specialist services.
